files_changed_via_concurrent_commit.note: This subtask's regression.jsonl append (the 4.5.12.3/F1 entry) was staged by this agent via git update-index directly against a clean HEAD blob (to avoid disturbing other agents' concurrent uncommitted edits to the same shared file), but landed in git history inside a DIFFERENT, concurrently-running agent's commit (2288388, subtask 4.5.18.1's 'fix(ingestion): update stale test_e2e_smoke.py assertions...') because this run shares one git index/working tree with other in-flight CDR agents and that commit happened to fire while the blob was staged. Content is byte-verified correct (git show <commit>:.cdr/index/regression.jsonl | grep 4.5.12.3 shows exactly this entry, id F1, run 114-verification, issue 50), so the requirement is satisfied, but the append is not attributable to this run's own commit. Flag for /cdr:verify.

summary: Fixed docs/LLD/btree.md's citation of a nonexistent .cdr/index/regression.jsonl entry for the 4.5.12.3 NextLeaf self-healing finding by (a) appending the actual finding (originally only in .cdr/runs/2026-07-11/114-verification/verification.json's non_blocking_findings[0], id F1) to regression.jsonl as a new entry tagged subtask 4.5.12.3, matching the file's existing schema, and (b) tightening the doc citation in this run's own commit to also name the originating run explicitly.
